name: Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirketi
summary: Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirketi provides factoring activities for domestic and international transactions. The company was formerly known as Creditwest Faktoring Hizmetleri A.S. and changed its name to Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirketi in July 2012. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Creditwest Faktoring Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of ALTINBAS HOLDING A.S.
